nasb.text: You shall celebrate the Feast of Weeks, that is, the first fruits of the wheat harvest, and the Feast of Ingathering at the turn of the year.

esv.text: You shall observe the Feast of Weeks, the firstfruits of wheat harvest, and the Feast of Ingathering at the year’s end.

cnv.text: 在收割初熟麥子的時候，你要守七七節；在年底，你要過收藏節。

ccb.text: “在收割初熟麦子的时候，要守七七收割节，年底要守收藏节。
